title: HyperDirector Asset Manifest
description: Declares image assets used in a HyperDirector composition. Tracks source, role, binding to scenes/shots/slots, render readiness, and optional variants. Validated before production render. See rules/image-assets-basics.md.

project.description: Project title or slug. Should match brief.title.

version.description: Semantic version of this manifest. Optional; useful for incremental asset pipeline iterations.

created_at.description: Date this manifest was first created. ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

updated_at.description: Date this manifest was last updated. ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

assets.description: Ordered list of image assets used in this project.

asset_id.description: Unique asset identifier within this manifest. Use snake_case or kebab-case. Examples: hero_image_01, brand_logo, scene02_bg.

type.description: Asset type. Always 'image' in this schema version.

role.description: Visual role of this asset in the composition. Use 'custom' with custom_role for project-specific roles not covered by this list.

custom_role.description: Required when role = 'custom'. Free-text description of the custom role. Examples: 'before_after_comparison_left', 'map_overlay', 'event_banner'.

source.description: Human-readable description of where this asset came from. Examples: 'Client-supplied via email 2026-05-10', 'Exported from Figma component Library v3', 'Screenshot of product UI at 1920x1080', 'PDF page 4 extracted via poppler'.

local_path.description: Relative path to the local file, from the project output root (same directory as index.html). Required if render_safe = true. Use forward slashes. Example: 'assets/hero.png'.

format.description: Image file format. Preferred formats for render: png, jpg, webp, svg. Avoid bmp, tiff for headless render.

width.description: Image width in pixels. Required for raster images; omit or set to 0 for SVG.

height.description: Image height in pixels. Required for raster images; omit or set to 0 for SVG.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio as a string. Examples: '16:9', '1:1', '4:3', '9:16'. Computed from width/height if not supplied.

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes. Used for advisory checks (R-IMG-06: warn > 5 MB). Populate with actual file stat when available.

has_alpha.description: Whether the image has an alpha (transparency) channel. Set to true for PNG/WebP with transparency.

variants.description: Optional list of alternative resolutions, formats, or crops of the same asset. Use to register compressed/downscaled versions for render while preserving the original as archive.

variant_id.description: Unique variant identifier within this asset. Examples: 'thumb_480', 'compressed_webp', 'cropped_square'.

local_path.description: Relative path to this variant file.

use_for_render.description: If true, this variant should be used in the production render instead of the parent asset's local_path. Only one variant per asset should have this set to true.

bindings.description: List of scene/shot/slot bindings. One asset may be bound to multiple positions in the composition. References storyboard scene IDs and shot IDs.

scene_id.description: Storyboard scene ID. Must match a scene.id in the corresponding storyboard.json. Examples: 'scene_01', 'scene-02'.

shot_id.description: Optional shot ID within the scene. Format: '<scene_id>-shot-<NN>'. Examples: 'scene_01-shot-01'.

slot.description: Named slot or layer in the composition HTML where this asset is placed. Examples: 'main_visual', 'background', 'logo_top_right', 'product_overlay'.

usage.description: How this asset is used at this binding location. Examples: 'full_bleed_background', 'logo_watermark', 'ui_screenshot', 'product_hero'.

priority.description: Binding priority when multiple assets compete for the same slot. Lower number = higher priority. Defaults to 1.

license_status.description: License or ownership status of this asset. 'pending' or 'unknown' blocks render_safe = true. 'ai_generated' must have explicit user confirmation before production use.

license_notes.description: Additional license details. Examples: 'Client provided written authorization on 2026-05-10', 'Unsplash free license, attribution not required', 'Requires attribution in video description'.

render_safe.description: Whether this asset is cleared for production render. Must be true for all assets used in final render (R-IMG-09). Set to false during planning phase. Flip to true only when: local_path exists, format is approved, no external dependencies, license_status confirmed.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this asset. Record source context, crop decisions, or known issues.

assets.source: Exported from brand kit Figma file

assets.notes: PENDING: awaiting client approval for compressed variant

variants.notes: Half-resolution for thumbnail or mobile preview
